raw_comment:
1) Notice: I notice that people of color mainly dominate the field.

2) Wonder: I wonder how the athletes feel when they don't have coaches that have had the same experiences as them or can relate to?

3) I feel that it could make us feel less of a person. We see that non-people of color work in the higher-up positions. Living in an area that is mainly just poc, this graph could make us feel as if we only belong in one certain positions.

4) Headline: Difference in positions for people of color on the sports field.
ace_sentences: I notice that people of color mainly dominate the field.
I wonder how the athletes feel.
Some athletes do not have coaches.
Some coaches have had the same experiences as the athletes.
Some coaches can relate to the athletes.
If athletes do not have coaches that have had the same experiences as them, then the athletes can feel bad.
If athletes do not have coaches that can relate to them, then the athletes can feel bad.
It could make us feel less of a person.
We see that non-people of color work in the higher-up positions.
I live in an area that is mainly just poc.
This graph could make us feel as if we only belong in one certain positions.
Difference in positions for people of color on the sports field.
